title: Providers
description: Array of provider entries. Each entry describes a single practice/clinic with contact details and source-verification metadata.

name.description: Official practice or clinic name as it appears on the provider's website.

postal_code.description: Postal code in the country's native format (e.g. "30159" for Germany).

latitude.description: WGS84 latitude as a float (e.g. 52.5200066). Null if geocoding has not yet been performed or could not resolve the address.

longitude.description: WGS84 longitude as a float (e.g. 13.404954). Null if geocoding has not yet been performed or could not resolve the address.

phone.description: Phone number in international format with spaces (e.g. "+49 511 123 717 0"), or null if none is published.

email.description: Public contact email, or null if none is published.

website.description: Homepage URL including scheme, or null if none is published.

source_url.description: URL of the page used to verify the provider's details.

verified_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp (date or datetime) when the entry was last verified against source_url.

services.description: Reserved field. Always an empty array ([]).
